description: Triggers when user is building with SvelteKit or Svelte 5 runes, needs routing, load functions, form actions, or API routes
should_trigger: Build a page with SvelteKit routing
Use Svelte 5 runes for state management
Implement a SvelteKit load function to fetch data
Create form actions in SvelteKit for mutation
Add an API route in SvelteKit
Use SvelteKit hooks for auth middleware
Progressive enhancement with use:enhance in SvelteKit
should_not_trigger: Build a page with Next.js App Router
